overall.description: Aerial footage of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring two giant holographic koi fish (one blue, one red) swimming in circular patterns above a multi-level circular structure. The scene showcases neon-lit skyscrapers and high-quality game engine graphics with a cinematic, synthwave atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular plaza with holographic fish display

events.description: Kang Tao corporate signage becomes visible on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting the plaza in a stabilized aerial drone shot, capturing the holographic display from a high vantage point

entered.detail: large translucent blue holographic koi fish with flowing fins and glowing edges
large glowing red-orange holographic koi fish with flowing fins and particle effects
multi-level circular concrete plaza with concentric ring architecture and central void
tall skyscraper with prominent vertical yellow neon strip lighting
surrounding cluster of high-rise buildings with various neon advertisements and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by two massive holographic fish swimming in circular patterns above the structure. The blue fish glows on the left while the red fish illuminates the right side, both casting light on the concentric rings of the plaza below. Around the 12-second mark, Kang Tao corporate signage becomes visible on a left-side building as the drone continues its slow clockwise orbit.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular plaza with holographic fish display - rotated perspective

agents.ego_description: continuing the aerial orbit around the plaza, now showing the red fish in the foreground

entered.detail: illuminated white corporate signage reading 'Kang Tao' on the building facade

segments.scene_description: As the drone continues its clockwise orbit, the red holographic fish moves into the left foreground while the blue fish swims toward the right background. The Kang Tao signage remains visible on the left side of the frame. The camera captures the full circular motion of the fish around the plaza, with neon-lit skyscrapers providing a consistent cyberpunk backdrop throughout the rotation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise aerial orbit around a futuristic cyberpunk plaza, shifting the perspective of two massive holographic fish as they circle a multi-level structure. It begins with a wide view of the plaza where a glowing blue fish on the left and a red fish on the right cast vibrant light across concentric rings. As the camera rotates, the movement brings Kang Tao corporate signage into view on a building to the left. The scene then shifts as the red holographic fish glides into the left foreground while the blue fish recedes toward the right background. This fluid rotation finally reveals the full circular motion of the creatures against a consistent backdrop of neon-lit skyscrapers.
